mapper.sql: id, title, addr1, addr2, zipcode, tel, first_image as firstImage, first_image2 as firstImage2, read_count as readCount, sido_code as sidoCode, gugun_code as gugunCode, ST_Y(location) as latitude, ST_X(location) as longitude, mlevel, content_type_id as contentTypeId, overview

a.id, a.title, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.zipcode, a.tel, a.firstImage, a.firstImage2, a.readCount, a.sidoCode, a.gugunCode, a.latitude, a.longitude, a.mlevel, a.contentTypeId, a.overview, a.distanceMeters, coalesce(stats.favorite_count, 0) as favoriteCount, coalesce(stats.save_count, 0) as saveCount, coalesce(stats.average_rating, 0) as ratingAverage, coalesce(stats.rating_count, 0) as ratingCount, t.id as tagId, t.name as tagName, case when f.attraction_id is null then false else true end as favorited, case when s.attraction_id is null then false else true end as saved, my_rating.rating as myRating

left join attraction_popularity_stats stats on stats.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_favorites f on f.attraction_id = a.id and f.user_id = #{viewerUserId} left join attraction_saves s on s.attraction_id = a.id and s.user_id = #{viewerUserId} left join attraction_ratings my_rating on my_rating.attraction_id = a.id and my_rating.user_id = #{viewerUserId} left join attraction_tag_mappings m on m.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_tags t on t.id = m.tag_id
mapper.select:
select from ( select ,
ST_Distance( location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography )
null as distanceMeters from attractions
content_type_id = #{contentTypeId}
and ( title ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(addr1, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(addr2, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(overview, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and location is not null and ST_DWithin( location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters} )
and sido_code = #{sidoCode}
and gugun_code = #{gugunCode}
order by location <-> ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), title asc, id asc
order by read_count desc nulls last, title asc, id asc
limit #{limit} ) a
order by
a.distanceMeters asc, a.title asc, a.id asc, t.name asc a.readCount desc nulls last, a.title asc, a.id asc, t.name asc
select count(*) from attractions where id = #{attractionId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_favorites (attraction_id, user_id) values (#{attractionId}, #{userId}) on conflict (attraction_id, user_id) do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_favorites where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_saves (attraction_id, user_id) values (#{attractionId}, #{userId}) on conflict (attraction_id, user_id) do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_saves where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_ratings (attraction_id, user_id, rating) values (#{attractionId}, #{userId}, #{rating}) on conflict (attraction_id, user_id) do update set rating = excluded.rating, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_ratings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_popularity_stats ( attraction_id, rating_count, average_rating, updated_at ) select #{attractionId}, count(*)::integer, coalesce(avg(rating), 0)::numeric(3, 2), current_timestamp from attraction_ratings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} on conflict (attraction_id) do update set rating_count = excluded.rating_count, average_rating = excluded.average_rating, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select id, name from attraction_tags order by name asc
insert into attraction_tags (name) values (#{name}) returning id, name
mapper.update: update attraction_tags set name = #{name} where id = #{tagId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from attraction_tags where id in #{id}
mapper.sql: a.id as attractionId, coalesce(stats.favorite_count, 0) as favoriteCount, coalesce(stats.save_count, 0) as saveCount, coalesce(stats.average_rating, 0) as averageRating, coalesce(stats.rating_count, 0) as ratingCount, t.id as tagId, t.name as tagName, case when f.attraction_id is null then false else true end as favorited, case when s.attraction_id is null then false else true end as saved, my_rating.rating as myRating

from attractions a left join attraction_popularity_stats stats on stats.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_favorites f on f.attraction_id = a.id and f.user_id = #{userId} left join attraction_saves s on s.attraction_id = a.id and s.user_id = #{userId} left join attraction_ratings my_rating on my_rating.attraction_id = a.id and my_rating.user_id = #{userId} left join attraction_tag_mappings m on m.attraction_id = a.id left join attraction_tags t on t.id = m.tag_id
mapper.select:
select
where a.id in #{id} order by a.id asc, t.name asc
select attraction_id as attractionId, (favorite_count + save_count) as count from attraction_popularity_stats where attraction_id in #{id}
select from attractions where id in #{id}
